S
SolSentry
Interactive API & SDK DocsMCP Protocol
v3.0.0 — CLI, x402 Micropayments, Agent Autonomy & Backtesting

Every AI agent can trade.
SolSentry makes sure they don't get rekt.

Institutional-grade quantitative risk engine, real-time transaction simulator, developer CLI, x402 pay-as-you-go micropayments, and multi-framework AI agent plugins for Solana.

Developer CLI Quickstart:
$ npm install -g @solsentry/cli
$ solsentry check kamino --details
$ solsentry simulate tx_base58_string

🤖 Multi-Framework AI Agent Plugins

First-class integration packages for ElizaOS (@solsentry/eliza-plugin), Solana Agent Kit (@solsentry/agent-kit), LangChain / CrewAI (@solsentry/langchain), and MCP Clients.

💳 x402 Pay-As-You-Go Micropayments

Native Solana Pay USDC micropayments header (X-402-Payment) per API/MCP call. No subscriptions required — pay per call on chain.

⚡ Autonomous Execution & Guardrails

Automated de-leveraging transaction generation, portfolio rebalancing, and circuit breaker halts when daily drawdown limits are triggered.

📈 Historical Crash Backtesting Engine

Simulate policy enforcement rules against historical Solana market crashes (Nov 2022 FTX, March 2023 USDC de-peg, Feb 2022 Wormhole hack).

💻 Official Developer CLI (@solsentry/cli)

Standalone terminal binary providing instantaneous protocol risk scoring, transaction simulation, and policy checks right from your CLI shell.

📡 Real-Time SSE Streaming API (/api/v1/stream)

Server-Sent Events (SSE) streaming live oracle heartbeats, Pyth price feed de-peg alerts, and liquidation warnings directly to AI agents.

SolSentry Quantitative Risk Engine v3.0.0. Open Source MIT License.
